title: Brown Sequin Reindeer Antler Christmas Hairclips – Pack of 2 Festive Clip-In Antlers for Holiday Fancy Dress & Christmas Outfits
features: Festive Reindeer Antler Design – Add Christmas joy to your outfit with these adorable brown sequin antler hairclips, perfect for festive dressing.
Ideal for Parties & Celebrations – Great for Christmas Day, school events, office parties, festive photos and seasonal fancy dress fun.
Pack of 2 Clip-In Antlers – Includes two matching antler hairclips, easy to secure in place for both children (under supervision) and adults.
Lightweight & Comfortable – Each clip measures approx. 8cm x 6.5cm and is made from soft polyester with sparkling sequin detailing.
For Decorative Use Only – Not a toy. Contains small parts. Keep out of reach of small children.
description: Sold: Single Approx size: 8cm x 6.5cm / 3.2 in x 2.6 in Material: Polyester Pack includes 2 antlers.
